changes.value:
**File:** `kanban-app/ui/src/components/grid-view.tsx:43`

```ts
const entityType = view.entity_type ?? "task";
```

Defaults to "task" when a view definition doesn't declare an entity type. Views should always declare their entity type — this fallback hides misconfiguration.
